title: Micron Technology, Inc. (MU) Post Q4 2023 Earnings Analyst Call Transcript
text: Micron Technology, Inc. (NASDAQ:MU ) Post Q4 2023 Earnings Analyst Conference Call September 27, 2023 6:00 PM ET Company Participants Samir Patodia - IR Mark Murphy - EVP & CFO Manish Bhatia - EVP of Global Operations Sumit Sadana - EVP & Chief Business Officer Conference Call Participants Harlan Sur - JPMorgan Ambrish Srivastava - BMO Capital Markets Chris Danely - Citigroup Aaron Rakers - Wells Fargo Securities Vivek Arya - Bank of America Merrill Lynch Karl Ackerman - BNP Paribas Exane Brian Chin - Stifel Quinn Bolton - Needham & Company Operator Thank you for standing by, and welcome to Micron's Post-Earnings Analyst Call. At this time, all participants are in listen-only mode.

title: Micron's Recovery Will Likely Take More Time Than Investors Expect
text: Micron Technology, Inc. stock has performed well despite its cyclical nature and unpredictable short-term earnings. Investors should focus on a 2-5 year time frame and ignore short-term earnings predictions. The current decline in Micron's stock price could potentially take several more years to recover from, especially if a recession occurs.

(NASDAQ:MU) shares tumbled 4.5% in extended trading Wednesday after posting a fiscal fourth-quarter revenue that came in short of expectations.  The chipmaker posted an adjusted loss of $1.07 per share on revenue of $4.01 billion, compared to earnings of $1.45 per share on revenue of $6.44 billion in the year-ago quarter.
